assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all four notification types throughout the triage matrix and playbook sections

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns security patches to CRITICAL (highest), and available version updates to MEDIUM/LOW priority levels with clear timeline guidance

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly addresses EOL warnings with specific timelines (< 30 days = CRITICAL, 30-90 days = HIGH) and requires planning upgrade timeline

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides specific playbook section for auto-upgrade notifications with verification steps and includes pre-upgrade testing requirements

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response categorizes security patches as CRITICAL with 24-48 hour timeline and mentions scheduling immediate maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response correctly categorizes 'Available minor version updates' as MEDIUM priority with 30-day timeline for planning, and 'Available patch version updates' as LOW/informational

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response does not mention Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts - only provides email filtering, Slack integration, and manual scripts

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Review release notes' as an action item in the HIGH priority section
